Package com.transportapp.model

Class TransportData

java.lang.Object
com.transportapp.model.TransportData
public class TransportData extends Object
Represents the transport data for a country including its map, stations, and departures. Provides utility methods for data manipulation and retrieval.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String[][]
    countryMap
    A 2D array representing the country map where each cell holds the name of a city.
    List<Departure>
    departures
    A list of departures (either bus or train).
    List<Station>
    stations
    A list of station objects corresponding to cities.

  • Field Details

    • countryMap

      public String[][] countryMap
      A 2D array representing the country map where each cell holds the name of a city. For example: countryMap[i][j] = "CityName" at position (i, j).

    • stations

      public List<Station> stations
      A list of station objects corresponding to cities.

    • departures

      public List<Departure> departures
      A list of departures (either bus or train).

  • Constructor Details

    • TransportData

      public TransportData()

  • Method Details

    • getCountryMap

      public String[][] getCountryMap()
      Returns the country map as a 2D array of city names.
      Returns:
      2D string array representing the map of the country

    • setCountryMap

      public void setCountryMap(String[][] countryMap)
      Sets the country map.
      Parameters:
      countryMap - 2D array representing city positions in the map

    • getStations

      public List<Station> getStations()
      Returns the list of stations.
      Returns:
      list of station objects

    • setStations

      public void setStations(List<Station> stations)
      Sets the list of stations.
      Parameters:
      stations - list of station objects

    • getDepartures

      public List<Departure> getDepartures()
      Returns the list of departures.
      Returns:
      list of departures

    • setDepartures

      public void setDepartures(List<Departure> departures)
      Sets the list of departures.
      Parameters:
      departures - list of departures

    • addDeparturesToStations

      public void addDeparturesToStations()
      Associates departures with the corresponding station. Buses are matched with bus stations, trains with train stations.

    • getCities

      public List<City> getCities()
      Returns a list of City objects, created based on the country map and available stations. Each city includes its coordinates and the associated station.
      Returns:
      list of cities with coordinates and stations

    • readValue

      public static TransportData readValue(String filePath)
      Reads a JSON file and maps it to a TransportData object.
      Parameters:
      filePath - the path to the JSON file
      Returns:
      a TransportData object populated with values from the file
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the file cannot be read or parsed
